creator: jrm@freebsd.org
text:
The sysctl aio tweaks improve the stability of VB running a Windows7 guest, but heavy IO still caused a problem for me.  For example, I was able to get through the Windows installation after making the sysctl changes, but later, during installing of many Windows updates, Windows locks up and eventually a BSOD appears with complaints about possible hardware issues.  This is running virtualbox-ose-5.1.26 on 11.1-RELEASE-p1 amd64.

P.S. 30000 already is the default for vfs.aio.aiod_lifetime on all my systems running 11.1.
